chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 945 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4231/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.4232/2024. 23.10.2025 Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Barkat Ali Metlo, advocate for the respondent. Per learned counsel impugned judgment is prima facie devoid of any independent reasoning or deliberation and the same is prima facie unmerited in view of the fact that the Tribunal is the last fact finding forum in the statutory hierarchy. Counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper, for the reasons as aforesaid, for the impugned judgment be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. It is also stated that such exercise be concluded expeditiously, preferably within the period of one month. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
